description_long: This is a large, rectangular table with a flat wooden top and four sturdy, angular metal legs. The tabletop has a natural wood grain finish, giving it a warm and classic appearance suitable for communal or work settings. The legs are positioned at the corners and are made of dark metal, providing both stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The table's design is minimalistic, with no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing function over ornamentation. Its size suggests it could comfortably accommodate several people for meetings, dining, or collaborative work. The materials and construction indicate it is robust enough for outdoor or indoor urban environments such as parks, plazas, or community centers.
description: A large, rectangular wooden table with four dark metal legs and a minimalist, modern design. The table is sturdy and functional, suitable for communal or work use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden tabletop and all four metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow width of the tabletop and the depth of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop's width and leg depth.
